parameters.name: callbacks
parameters.label: Callbacks DAT
parameters.description: Runs this script once for each change to the table. See for usage.

parameters.name: usage
parameters.label: Usage
parameters.description: Specify which serial devices to report information about based on their availability.

parameters.name: refreshpulse
parameters.label: Refresh Pulse
parameters.description: Instantly poll for serial device changes and update the table.

parameters.name: enablepolling
parameters.label: Enable Polling
parameters.description: While on, poll for serial device changes periodically and update the table.

parameters.name: pollingtime
parameters.label: Polling Time
parameters.description: Time in seconds to wait for the next poll.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.
